title: Mali’s widening war: how coordinated attacks expose the limits of a battered state
standfirst: A series of co-ordinated assaults across Mali has underlined how far the country’s security crisis has spread beyond any single front. In a region where armed groups, separatists and state forces are all contending for ground, the violence now speaks to a deeper collapse of authority — and to the risk that instability in the Sahel will continue to radiate far beyond its borders.
